deep_dive.title: NSVQ: Mitigating Codebook Collapse by Stabilizing Encoder Drift in Vector Quantization
deep_dive.abstract: Vector quantization is central to modern generative modeling pipelines, but large-codebook VQ models often suffer from codebook collapse. We identify encoder drift as a key driver of this failure: as the encoder moves the latent distribution, sparsely updated code vectors can lag behind, lose assignments, and increase quantization error, creating a feedback loop through the straight-through estimator. We propose NSVQ, a non-stationary-aware VQ training strategy that combines a dense non-stationary embedding loss, codebook replacement, and stage-wise encoder freezing. NSVQ first helps the codebook track encoder drift during early training, then freezes the encoder to consolidate the codebook under a fixed latent geometry, and finally reintroduces adversarial refinement. Experiments on ImageNet-1k show that NSVQ improves reconstruction quality while maintaining full codebook utilization. On ImageNet-1k at 128$\times$128 with 65,536 codes, NSVQ reduces rFID from 2.39 to 2.10 compared with SimVQ, while both methods maintain 100\% utilization. Additional latent diffusion experiments show that NSVQ also improves downstream ImageNet generation FID.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: stage-wise encoder freezing and non-stationary embedding loss for VQ training
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 通过分阶段编码器冻结和非平稳嵌入损失缓解码本坍塌
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 通过分阶段编码器冻结和非平稳嵌入损失缓解码本坍塌
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 通过分阶段编码器冻结和非平稳嵌入损失缓解码本坍塌
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: NSVQ proposes a non-stationary-aware VQ training strategy combining dense embedding loss, codebook replacement, and stage-wise encoder freezing to mitigate codebook collapse, improving latent quantization stability.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 向量量化中码本坍塌严重影响生成质量。本文发现编码器漂移是主因，提出NSVQ：使用非平稳嵌入损失帮助码本跟踪编码器，然后冻结编码器稳定码本。实验表明该方法有效缓解了码本坍塌，提高了量化效率。该训练策略可直接应用于神经视频压缩中的潜变量量化，提升压缩性能。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 向量量化中码本坍塌严重影响生成质量。本文发现编码器漂移是主因，提出NSVQ：使用非平稳嵌入损失帮助码本跟踪编码器，然后冻结编码器稳定码本。实验表明该方法有效缓解了码本坍塌，提高了量化效率。该训练策略可直接应用于神经视频压缩中的潜变量量化，提升压缩性能。
deep_dive.matched_query_text: Differentiable quantization optimization for latent in video compression

quick_skim.title: EvoGS: Constructing Continuous-Layered Gaussian Splatting with Evolution Tree for Scalable 3D Streaming
quick_skim.abstract: Streaming 3D Gaussian Splatting requires highly scalable, progressive representations. Existing progressive methods rely on \textit{discrete layering}, accumulating separate splat sets for each level of detail. This structural independence between layers inherently leads to error accumulation, severe splat redundancy, and uncontrolled quality transitions. We propose EvoGS, the first \textit{continuous-layering} representation. Organized as an Evolution Tree, EvoGS generates finer details via an explicit, wavelet-inspired parent-child refinement. This empowers child nodes to structurally correct ancestral errors, yield inherently sparse and highly compressible inter-layer signals. Extensive experiments show EvoGS eliminates splat redundancy from over 65\% to under 25\%. Compared to state-of-the-art baselines, it reduces transmission payload and GPU VRAM footprint by up to 2.4$\times$ and 5.5$\times$, respectively, and achieves smooth quality transitions optimal for real-time adaptive streaming. Project page: https://yuang-ian.github.io/evogs/
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: continuous-layered representation for scalable 3D streaming, directly relates to scalable NVC
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 连续层级表示用于可扩展3D流，直接关联可扩展神经视频编码
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 连续层级表示用于可扩展3D流，直接关联可扩展神经视频编码
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 连续层级表示用于可扩展3D流，直接关联可扩展神经视频编码
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes EvoGS, a continuous-layering representation using an Evolution Tree with wavelet-inspired parent-child refinement for scalable 3D streaming, eliminating error accumulation and redundancy.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 现有可扩展3D高斯泼溅方法依赖离散分层，导致误差累积和冗余。本文提出EvoGS，基于进化树的连续层级表示，通过类似小波的父子细化机制，使子节点能修正祖先误差。实验表明EvoGS消除了冗余，实现了高度可压缩的层间信号，显著提升可扩展3D流性能。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 现有可扩展3D高斯泼溅方法依赖离散分层，导致误差累积和冗余。本文提出EvoGS，基于进化树的连续层级表示，通过类似小波的父子细化机制，使子节点能修正祖先误差。实验表明EvoGS消除了冗余，实现了高度可压缩的层间信号，显著提升可扩展3D流性能。

quick_skim.title: STAR-KV: Low-Rank KV Cache Compression via Soft Thresholding for Adaptive Rank Control
quick_skim.abstract: Low-rank projection has emerged as a promising approach for compressing the KV cache by exploiting hidden-dimension redundancy. However, prior methods rely on fixed or heuristic rank selection and struggle to achieve aggressive compression with minimal accuracy degradation. We propose STAR-KV, an adaptive low-rank KV cache compression framework with fine-grained rank control. STAR-KV encompasses 1) a differentiable thresholding mechanism that enables optimal rank selection at both attention-head and block levels, 2) a hybrid decomposition strategy that applies different low-rank factorizations according to the sensitivity of key and value projections, and 3) a low-rank-aware mixed precision quantization that leverages data statistics for near lossless low-bit quantization. Evaluated across multiple LLMs and benchmarks, STAR-KV achieves up to 75% KV cache compression and up to 20x overall KV cache reduction when combined with quantization. Enabled by custom Triton-based GPU kernels, STAR-KV delivers up to 6.9x speedup for the attention module and 3.1x end-to-end generation throughput. Our code is publicly available at: https://github.com/PriyanshBhatnagar/STAR-KV.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: KV cache compression with low-rank and quantization, training tricks
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: KV缓存压缩中的低秩与量化训练技巧
quick_skim.llm_evidence: KV缓存压缩中的低秩与量化训练技巧
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: KV缓存压缩中的低秩与量化训练技巧
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes adaptive low-rank KV cache compression via differentiable thresholding, hybrid decomposition, and low-rank-aware quantization.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: Transformer推理时KV缓存占用大量显存，现有低秩压缩方法依赖固定秩选择。本文提出STAR-KV，通过可微阈值机制实现自适应秩选择，并融合混合分解与低秩感知混合精度量化。该方法可视为一种模型压缩与量化训练技巧，对视频压缩模型的轻量化部署有参考价值。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: Transformer推理时KV缓存占用大量显存，现有低秩压缩方法依赖固定秩选择。本文提出STAR-KV，通过可微阈值机制实现自适应秩选择，并融合混合分解与低秩感知混合精度量化。该方法可视为一种模型压缩与量化训练技巧，对视频压缩模型的轻量化部署有参考价值。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: Papers central to 检索视频压缩模型的训练 trick，包括量化、蒸馏、剪枝、多阶段训练等技术，调研不同优化策略对编码性能、推理速度、模型大小的提升效果，设计适用于端侧部署的轻量化训练方案。, especially work that connects or combines: Low-complexity codec; neural video compression model training techniques; quantization aware training for video coding models; knowledge distillation strategies for video compression; model pruning methods for lightweight video codecs; multi-stage training pipeline for neural video compression; Differentiable quantization optimization for latent in video compression; Knowledge distillation for efficient neural video codec training; Model pruning and acceleration for end to end video coding; Multi stage training strategy for rate distortion performance improvement.

quick_skim.title: BiWM: Advancing Open-Source Interactive Video World Models with Bidirectional Autoregression
quick_skim.abstract: Transitioning bidirectional video diffusion models into an autoregressive paradigm improves the interactivity of video world models, but existing causal pipelines need many stages (control fine-tuning, autoregressive training, causal initialization, few-step distillation) and still trail bidirectional models in quality due to error accumulation. Recent world models such as Yume-1.5 and Matrix-Game-3.0 instead adopt a bidirectional autoregressive approach, gaining fidelity and stable long-horizon rollout from self-correcting error propagation, yet open-source frameworks (e.g., minWM) support only causal models. We present BiWM, the first full-stack framework for interactive video world models under the bidirectional autoregressive paradigm, jointly optimizing generation quality and inference speed. From a pretrained video backbone, BiWM injects camera control by fine-tuning, then runs a few-step Distribution Matching Distillation (DMD) stage that turns the backbone into an action/camera-controllable world model: just two training stages instead of four in minWM, converging in a few hundred steps on 8xH200 GPUs. A single recipe spans Wan2.1-1.3B, Wan2.2-5B, HunyuanVideo-1.5-8B, and LTX-2.3-22B, and also supports secondary fine-tuning of existing bidirectional models. BiWM enables real-world camera control where minWM loses controllability, integrates pluggable history compression (FramePack-style and PackForcing-style) for long rollouts, and offers an optional NVFP4 4-bit training/inference pipeline. To counter DMD's mode-seeking degradation, we add GAN and mass-covering forward-KL objectives that preserve scene dynamics. We open-source BiWM for resource-constrained research and high-fidelity environment simulation.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: bidirectional video diffusion for interactive world models, related to generative video compression
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 双向视频扩散用于交互世界模型，与生成式视频压缩相关
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 双向视频扩散用于交互世界模型，与生成式视频压缩相关
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 双向视频扩散用于交互世界模型，与生成式视频压缩相关
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: BiWM presents a full-stack framework for bidirectional autoregressive video world models using diffusion, improving fidelity and long-term stability. Relevant to generative video compression.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 本文提出BiWM框架，首次实现双向自回归视频世界模型的开源全栈方案。通过双向扩散和自回归范式，解决了因果模型中的误差累积问题，提升了长视频生成的质量和稳定性。该研究为生成式视频压缩提供了可借鉴的生成模型架构和训练策略，尤其是双向扩散在视频预测中的应用。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 本文提出BiWM框架，首次实现双向自回归视频世界模型的开源全栈方案。通过双向扩散和自回归范式，解决了因果模型中的误差累积问题，提升了长视频生成的质量和稳定性。该研究为生成式视频压缩提供了可借鉴的生成模型架构和训练策略，尤其是双向扩散在视频预测中的应用。
